title: Fairy Lights
description: Decorative string lights to light up your world! A Fabric & NeoForge port.
body:
![Fairy Lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91a42890ad6a4d413a63e4bc3dbbf3118412a9c5.png)

Fairy Lights adds decorative hanging lights that can have any combination of six light variants each with one of the sixteen dye colors. A Fabric & NeoForge port of the original [Fairy Lights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fairy-lights).

## News
- As of v1.2.0, NeoForge 1.21.1 is supported natively!
- On Fabric, versions 1.2.0 and above use a new architecture that might still have some issues. If you're encountering any bugs, try downgrading to v1.1.4.

## Features
- Different types of lights: fairy lights, lanterns, incandescent light bulbs, and many more!
- Pennants: Squares & Triangles
- Arbitrary patterns of lights and pennants
- Increase or decrease the slack of hanging ropes by right clicking with string or a stick respectively.
- Hanging lights can be turned on and off by right clicking
- EMI and JEI integration

## Gallery

![Fairy Lights](https://i.imgur.com/o4V1mVB.png)

![Colorful Pennants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e26092c4a6528d197189d76eb92d529cee334a8.png)

## Crafting

Fairy lights are crafted by a horizontal combination of iron ingot, string or stick, iron ingot, along with any combination of lights to specify a pattern (left-right, top-down). Combine a light with glowstone dust to make it twinkle. The hanging lights item will only show the first four light colors, but the most lights that can be crafted is eight by placing a hanging lights in a crafting table with eight lights. Pennant buntings work analogously.

<center>

![Some crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb3e30fb8b1fe187e7707aa4b66f348ee6adc72.png)

_A selection of crafting recipes._

## Modpacks
Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.
